steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0005, t0007, t0008, t0020 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure and initial files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016 paper and any related corpus papers on DSGC compartmental modelling; enumerate every test the paper runs.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search for supplementary materials and any related online resources (ModelDB release notes, errata, author addenda).

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review the ModelDB 189347 release end-to-end; document every file, parameter, and code path. Compare with t0008 and t0020 library assets.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the from-scratch port structure, audit-table schema, and per-paper-test reproduction plan.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local CPU only; no remote compute required for this reproduction.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build the faithful ModelDB 189347 port, run every paper test, fill in the audit table, catalogue paper-vs-code discrepancies, produce 1 library and 1 answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: exact reproduction is the goal; out-of-the-box alternatives are not in scope.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md with paper-test-reproduction table and per-figure charts; populate metrics.json; record costs and remote machines.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Write compare_literature.md contrasting our reproduction results against Poleg-Polsky 2016's published values for every quantitative claim.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on reproduction outcomes and catalogued discrepancies.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed, prepare for PR.
